inline_comments.message:
I'm not a fan of the "Here" on the end of this.
I think it would be better with just openstackEncryptedPassword:

Then I think a dummy value that looks like the real thing should be used as the default (encrypt the word password or something)
You can document the value with comments above it instead using the default value as documentation.
I can put the same example string as for SO but we have two references to that same variable for APPC and SO so I was going for consistency ?
